core_mechanism: compilation of an interactively, direct-manipulation-constructed visual structure into a portable declarative source representation, with round-trip serialization back to that visual model (a WYSIWYG-editor-to-markup/code transform)
brief_reason: The abstract describes building diagrams via mouse click-and-drag and then emitting them as LaTeX code plus saving/reloading them as XML, i.e. a bidirectional mapping between an interactive graphical model and a declarative text source; honestly this is a software-tool paper with no underlying mathematical/dynamical mechanism, so this editor-to-declarative-source transform is the most specific transferable machinery the text supports.
